pi_items.source: Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh which creates this directory and copies scenario files into it.
Task description and verifier.py expect the agent to output statistics to this path.
Task description and verifier.py check this path for the text report.
Verified against task description and verifier.py which explicitly parses these exact keys.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real-world Bologna Pasubio scenario from the iTETRIS project. The agent must run the simulation with emissions devices enabled for all vehicles and extract total emissions. Running the provided scenario through SUMO yields exactly 8776 vehicles. The true aggregated emissions totals for this scenario are approximately: CO2_mg: 4041511822.8, CO_mg: 35905401.16, NOx_mg: 10795954.69, PMx_mg: 367976.66, and Fuel_mL: 1272917878.36. The VLM should check if the agent's reported values in emissions_report.txt closely match these ground truth figures, indicating correct execution and parsing of the SUMO emissions output.
